articles.title: Sony upgraded its wearable AC so it’s cooler and better at hugging your neck
articles.description: Sony has announced a new version of the wearable personal air conditioner the company first revealed in 2019 ahead of the 2020 Tokyo Olympics. The latest version is an upgrade to last year's Pro model, and while the new Reon Pocket Pro Plus isn't a complete overhaul of the hardware, it comes with performance upgrades […]
articles.author: Andrew Liszewski
